title: Feedback from BlueOrbit Media — User Management & SSO
text:
Source: In-app NPS survey
Customer: BlueOrbit Media (Mid-Market)
NPS score: 4
Product area: User Management & SSO

Comment: We cannot roll out to the whole company because there is no SAML SSO. IT is blocking us.

Requested improvement: Please add 'Granular notification controls'.
